Browsers

Brave Browser

brave

Privacy-oriented Chromium browser with built-in tracker blocking.

  • Windows

chromium

Open-source web browser project that powers Chrome and related browsers.

Tor Browser

tor-browser

  • Windows

Vivaldi

vivaldi

Customizable Chromium-based web browser.

  • Debian
  • macOS
  • Windows

Catalog 2026.07.13.1 · bundled development fixture; CLI authentication is authoritative

Source and releases (configured by the deploying repository) · No runtime backend
